chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-3380 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on CMA No.22223/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on CMA No.22224/2025 (Withdrawal) 3. For hearing of CMA No.7593/2025 (Restoration) 03.11.2025 Mr. Rashid Hussain advocate for the petitioner Mr. Faraz Ahmed Abro advocate for the respondent / KPT -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-3. Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press the instant petition. We also noted that there is an application for withdrawal of this petition dated 30.10.2025. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as withdrawn alongwith listed / pending application(s). HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
